details: The agent navigated to https://github.com/torvalds/linux, then opened the Makefile at https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Makefile, and successfully extracted the actual values from the page content. The eval output clearly shows 'VERSION = 7' and 'PATCHLEVEL = 0' in the raw page text, consistent with the latest commit message 'Linux 7.0-rc6'. The agent reported correct values based on actual page content, not hallucination.
